title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 06 Research Personnel Posts
description: The Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Research Personnel Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech, Ph.D., can apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age...
